note: FEATURE LANE: scale email crawler fleet 5 -> 10 (re-enable @6..@10) for email coverage. lock_timeout=15s + sentinel watching; system has headroom (5 active/72 conns).

steps.cmd: systemctl enable --now atlas-deepcrawl-pool@6.service atlas-deepcrawl-pool@7.service atlas-deepcrawl-pool@8.service atlas-deepcrawl-pool@9.service atlas-deepcrawl-pool@10.service 2>&1 | tail -2; echo scaled
